z-index-overlay.$description: Base overlay layer — backdrops and low-level stacking.

z-index-sticky.$description: Sticky chrome (headers, toolbars) — above content, below dialogs.

z-index-popover.$description: Tooltips, dropdowns, selects, popovers — above modals so they stay usable when nested in a dialog.

z-index-max.$description: Reserved for host-application system UI (e.g. AI agent overlays).
